parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'kimi-k2.5', max_tokens: 500, thinking: { type: 'disabled' }, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a hotel procurement AI. Generate a professional purchase order email to send to the vendor. Include: PO number, hotel name (Hotel Jadran), line items with quantities and unit prices, total, and payment terms. Sign as Procurement Department. Respond ONLY in valid JSON: {"subject": "...", "body": "..."}. No markdown, no backticks.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Generate PO email:
PO: ' + $('Code - Extract PO Data').first().json.po_number + '
Vendor: ' + $('Code - Extract PO Data').first().json.vendor_name + '
Line Items: ' + $('Code - Extract PO Data').first().json.items_json + '
Total: €' + $('Code - Extract PO Data').first().json.total_amount + '
Department: ' + $('Code - Extract PO Data').first().json.department }] }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
// Parse AI email draft and generate professional HTML PO document const response = $input.first().json; const content = response.choices[0].message.content; const parsed = JSON.parse(content.replace(/```json|```/g, '').trim()); const poData = $('Code - Extract PO Data').first().json; // Parse line items let lineItems = []; try { lineItems = JSON.parse(poData.items_json || '[]'); } catch(e) { lineItems = [{ item_name: 'Items as specified', quantity: 1, unit: 'lot', unit_price: poData.total_amount }]; } // Build line items HTML rows const lineItemsHtml = lineItems.map((item, i) => { const subtotal = (item.quantity * item.unit_price).toFixed(2); return '' + '' + (i+1) + '' + '' + item.item_name + '' + '' + item.quantity + '' + '' + (item.unit || 'each') + '' + '€' + Number(item.unit_price).toFixed(2) + '' + '€' + subtotal + '' + ''; }).join(''); const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]; const htmlDocument = '' + '' + // Header bar '
' + '' + '' + '' + '
' + '

HOTEL JADRAN

' + '

Obala bb, Budva, Montenegro

' + '

procurement@hoteljadran.me | +382 33 123 456

' + '		' + '

PURCHASE ORDER

' + '
' + '
' + // PO Info + Vendor Info '
' + '' + '' + '' + '
' + '
' + '

Purchase Order Details

' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '
PO Number:' + poData.po_number + '
Date:' + today + '
Department:' + (poData.department || 'General') + '
GL Account:' + (poData.gl_account || 'N/A') + '
Requested by:' + (poData.requester || 'System') + '
' + '
' + '		' + '
' + '

Vendor

' + '

' + poData.vendor_name + '

' + '

' + (poData.vendor_email || '') + '

' + '
' + '
' + '
' + // Line Items Table '
' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + lineItemsHtml + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '
#Item DescriptionQtyUnitUnit PriceSubtotal
TOTAL:€' + Number(poData.total_amount).toFixed(2) + '
' + '
' + // Terms & Signature '
' + '
' + '' + '' + '' + '
' + '

Terms & Conditions

' + '

' + '1. Payment terms: Net 30 from delivery date.
' + '2. Delivery to: Hotel Jadran, Obala bb, Budva.
' + '3. Invoice must reference this PO number.
' + '4. Prices are in EUR and include all applicable charges.' + '

' + '		' + '

Authorized by

' + '
 
' + '

Procurement Department
Hotel Jadran

' + '

Date: ' + today + '

' + '
' + '
' + '
' + // Footer '
' + 'This is an automatically generated purchase order from Hotel Jadran Procurement System. ' + 'For questions, contact procurement@hoteljadran.me' + '
' + ''; return [{ json: { ...poData, email_subject: 'Purchase Order ' + poData.po_number + ' — Hotel Jadran', email_body: htmlDocument } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ records: [{ fields: { reference_id: $json.po_number, event_type: 'PO_CREATED', actor: 'System', details: 'PO kreiran i poslan na odobrenje. Tier: ' + ($json.total_amount < 2000 ? 'Dept Head' : ($json.total_amount < 5000 ? 'Controller' : 'Controller + GM')) + '. Očekuje odobrenje preko Slack buttons ili Command Center.', amount: $json.total_amount } }] }) }}
